Observation.text: Joanna has been working on a project recently.
Besides writing, Joanna also enjoys reading, watching movies, and exploring nature as hobbies.
Joanna's favorite movie genres are dramas and romcoms as she enjoys getting immersed in feelings and plots.
Joanna recommended a romantic drama movie that focuses on memory and relationships.
Joanna watched a specific movie she recommended around 3 years ago and considers it one of her favorites.
Joanna finished her first full screenplay last Friday, which is a mix of drama and romance.
Joanna plans to submit her screenplay to film festivals and hopes to attract producers and directors to check it out.
Joanna is allergic to most reptiles and animals with fur, causing her face to get puffy and itchy.
Writing and hanging out with friends bring Joanna joy and help her express herself.
Writing allows Joanna to create wild worlds with interesting characters and serves as a great way to express her feelings.
Joanna submitted a screenplay to a film festival and is hoping a producer or director falls in love with it to get it on the big screen.
Joanna appreciates Nate's support for her screenplay and mentions that it means a lot to her.
Joanna seems curious about trying dairy-free desserts and flavors after Nate mentions making coconut milk ice cream.
Joanna enjoys the movie 'Little Women' and recommends it as a great story about sisterhood, love, and reaching for dreams.
Joanna is open to giving movie recommendations and discussing movies.
Joanna can't have dairy.
Joanna is keen to try Nate's dairy-free dessert recipe.
Joanna is a writer and has written a screenplay.
Joanna has started writing another screenplay focused on self-discovery after a loss, inspired by personal experiences.
Joanna's new screenplay is about a thirty-year-old woman on a journey of self-discovery after a loss, inspired by personal experiences.
Joanna hopes her screenplay gets noticed and makes it to the screen.
Joanna has completed her second script and is experiencing a mix of excitement and anxiety about its future.
Joanna finds it hard to switch off and experiences a tug-of-war between hope and doubt.
Joanna has done research and networking non-stop for her script and is determined to make it happen.
Joanna feels supported and motivated by having someone throughout the process.
Joanna auditioned for a writing gig and had mixed emotions about it - excited but also anxious.
Joanna has a lot of books that she uses for writing inspiration.
Joanna's advice for someone pursuing writing includes reading lots, trying different genres, building a solid understanding of literature, and not being afraid to write and share.
Joanna finds Nate's boldness inspiring and relates it to a gorgeous sunset she saw while hiking.
Joanna is currently consumed by her writing and is hoping for good news soon.
Joanna appreciates Nate's support for her writing projects.
Joanna has been reading a lot of books in the past week and rediscovered good books she owned.
Joanna found an awesome hiking trail in her hometown that she considers gorgeous and inspiring.
Joanna finds nature to be calming and a way to reset, with worries and stress vanishing when she is surrounded by its beauty.
Joanna loves nature and considers it her haven, finding peace and enjoyment in walking in it and feeling its calming effects.
Joanna is lactose intolerant.
Joanna is interested in trying Nate's dairy-free ice cream recipe made with coconut milk, vanilla extract, sugar, and salt.
Joanna recently joined a writers group that she finds inspirational and supportive.
Joanna is working on a script called 'Finding Home' with her writing group, which she finds rewarding and emotional.
Joanna's first passion was acting, but now she feels she shines in writing.
Joanna enjoys dramas and emotionally-driven films.
Joanna watched 'The Lord of the Rings' Trilogy based on Nate's recommendation and found it awesome.
Joanna has been working on some projects and testing dairy-free dessert recipes for friends and family.
Joanna made a dairy-free vanilla cake with strawberry filling and coconut cream frosting.
Cooking and baking are Joanna's creative outlets, and she enjoys experimenting in the kitchen.
Joanna enjoys hiking and found some amazing trails in her town.
Joanna took a photo at Whispering Falls, a beautiful and peaceful location.
Joanna feels calm and peaceful in nature, particularly during her hikes.

Joanna feels inspired by nature and finds it calming to be surrounded by its beauty.

In inspiring places like the trails, Joanna feels like writing a drama.
Joanna finds comfort in writing and creative projects during tough times.
Joanna has supportive friends who appreciate her work and with whom she can discuss and receive feedback.

Joanna believes that meaningful and powerful stories stem from personal experiences and feelings, even if they are challenging to write about.
Joanna values Nate's support and finds it encouraging in her creative endeavors.
Joanna values the moments that bring happiness and remind her that life is great.

Session.Summary: Nate and Joanna caught up at 7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022. Nate won his first video game tournament playing Counter-Strike: Global Offensive. Joanna enjoys writing, reading, movies, and nature. They found common interests in movies, with Nate liking action and sci-fi, while Joanna prefers dramas and romcoms. Joanna recommended a romantic drama to Nate, praising its storyline and acting. Nate promised to watch it and thanked Joanna for the suggestion.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Global Offensive with a team.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna! Long time no see! What's up? Anything fun going on?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate! Long time no see! I've been working on a project lately - it's been pretty cool. What about you - any fun projects or hobbies?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna! That's cool! I won my first video game tournament last week - so exciting!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow Nate! Congrats on winning! Tell me more - what game was it?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks! it's a team shooter game.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow, great job! What was is called?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: The game was called Counter-Strike: Global Offensive, and me and my team had a blast to the very end!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Cool, Nate! Sounds like a fun experience, even if I'm not into games.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: It was! How about you? Do you have any hobbies you love?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yeah! Besides writing, I also enjoy reading, watching movies, and exploring nature. Anything else you enjoy doing, Nate?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Playing video games and watching movies are my main hobbies.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Cool, Nate! So we both have similar interests. What type of movies do you like best?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I love action and sci-fi movies, the effects are so cool! What about you, what's your favorite genre?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I'm all about dramas and romcoms. I love getting immersed in the feelings and plots.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow, movies can be so powerful! Do you have any recommendations for me?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yeah, totally! Have you seen this romantic drama that's all about memory and relationships? It's such a good one.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a poster of a man and a woman sitting on a bench

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Oh cool! I might check that one out some time soon! I do love watching classics.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yep, that movie is awesome. I first watched it around 3 years ago. I even went out and got a physical copy!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a dvd on a table with a blurry background

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Sounds cool! Have you seen it a lot? sounds like you know the movie well!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: A few times. It's one of my favorites! I really like the idea and the acting.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Cool! I'll definitely check it out. Thanks for the recommendation!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: No problem, Nate! Let me know if you like it!

Session.Summary: Joanna and Nate caught up on January 23, 2022, at 2:01 pm. Joanna excitedly shared that she had completed her first screenplay, a mix of drama and romance, and planned to submit it to film festivals. Nate congratulated her and mentioned his turtles, recommending pets for stress relief. Joanna, allergic to animals with fur and reptiles, shared her joy for writing and hanging out with friends. Nate praised her passion for writing, and Joanna expressed her commitment to continue pursuing it. Nate also mentioned making new friends at a tournament.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna finishes writing her first full screenplay on drama and romance and plans on submitting it to a film festival so that producers and directors can check it out.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate starts hanging out with new people he met from outside his circle at the Counter Strike tournament.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate! Haven't talked in a few days. Crazy things happened to me!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hi Joanna! Long time no see! What's been going on? You sound excited!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Woo! I finally finished my first full screenplay and printed it last Friday. I've been working on for a while, such a relief to have it all done!
Turn.image_caption: a photography of a book with a page of text on it

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow, that sounds awesome! What's it about? Glad it's all down!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! It's a mix of drama and romance!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow, that's amazing! How do you feel now that it's finished? Do you have any new plans for it?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Woohoo, Nate! I'm feeling a rollercoaster of emotions - relief, excitement, some anxiety - over finishing this project. Now I'm gonna submit it to some film festivals and (hopefully) get producers and directors to check it out. Here's hoping!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Congrats, Joanna! That sounds like a wild experience. Rock on and I hope they love it!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks Nate! A mix of emotions for sure. Hopefully, it leads to positive feedback and new opportunities.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yeah, for sure. Hoping for the best! I like having some of these little ones around to keep me calm when things are super important and I'm nervous.
Turn.image_caption: a photography of a turtle and a turtleling sitting on a rock

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Awww! How long have you had them?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I've had them for 3 years now and they bring me tons of joy!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: They sure lookl like they do! Adorable!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks! The turtles might be small, but both sure have big personalities. I really reccomend having something like these little guys for times of stress.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Good idea, Nate! I'll think about it and maybe get pets of my own soon if I can find any I'm not allergic to. Have you been up to anything recently?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yeah actually! I start to hang out with some people outside of my circle at the tournament. They're pretty cool!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Oh? That sounds sweet! Is it a weird relationship with them being competitors and all?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Oh, kind of. Some people are more competitive then others, so I tend to just stick around the more chill people here.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: That makes sense! Are you gonna cheer them on even if you lose?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Absolutely! I don't expect to win big here, I just like playing for fun! You mentioned you were allergic to pets earlier, how bad is it?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Oh, its really bad. My face gets all puffy and itchy when I'm around certain animals, so I've always just stayed away.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Sorry to hear that. Allergies can be tough. What specifically are you allergic to?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I'm allergic to most reptiles and animals with fur. It can be a bit of a drag, but I find other ways to be happy.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Awesome! There are lots of things that can bring you joy without pets. What else brings you joy?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Writing and hanging with friends! That way I can express myself through stories, or just have a good time with people.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: That's great to hear! Those are both great things. I'm glad to hear you've got other things to help you get through times of axiousness despite not being able to have animals!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! Writing helps me create wild worlds with awesome characters. Plus, it's a great way to express my feelings. I can't imagine life without it.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow, Joanna, that sounds amazing! Keep doing what you love!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! I'll definitely keep pursuing my passion for writing. It means a lot.

Session.Summary: Joanna and Nate caught up at 9:27 am on 7 February, 2022. Joanna shared her mixed emotions about her screenplay submitted to a film festival and hoped it would make it to the big screen. Nate encouraged her, mentioning positive vibes. Joanna asked about Nate's life, and he talked about trying out coconut milk ice cream. They discussed flavors and Nate's dairy-free chocolate cake with berries. Nate recommended "Little Women" to Joanna, who enjoyed it. They agreed to exchange movie recommendations in the future. Both wished each other well and signed off.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna sends the first screenplay she wrote on drama and romance to a film festival.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate discovers he can make his own coconut milk ice cream and decides to give it a try.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate, long time no see! The screenplay I sent in to the film festival has been on my mind all day everyday. I keep bouncing between crazy emotions like relief, excitement and worry! Fingers crossed a producer or director falls in love with it and it ends up on the big screen - that would be awesome!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna! It is a big deal! I'm sure its been a wild ride. Sending some positive vibes and hoping someone likes it enough to get it on the big screen - that would be awesome!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks Nate, your support really means a lot. I put a lot of effort into it and I'm crossing my fingers. What about you? Anything new and exciting happening in your life?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks, Joanna. Not much has changed for me, but I just discovered that I can make coconut milk icecream and gave it a try. It was actually pretty good, so I'm proud of myself.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a bowl of ice cream with a spoon in it

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Looks delish! Glad you tried something new and it went well. What did you think of it?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Super good! It was rich and creamy - might be my new favorite snack!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Great! I love when you try something new and it actually works out. Will you give it another go?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yep, it could be fun! I'm looking forward to trying out different flavors and toppings.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yum! Sounds great. Got any favorite flavors for dairy-free desserts?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I love coconut milk, but I also enjoy chocolate and mixed berry flavors.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow, those sound great! Who can say no to chocolate and berries? I'm tempted to try dairy-free flavors now!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a piece of cake with berries on a plate

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Well I also made a dairy-free chocolate cake with berries on it the other day, maybe you would like that!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow! That sounds yummy! You're so talented. Thanks for sharing your amazing creations! I should really try making one or just pay you a visit and try one for myself!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I couldn't agree more! It's always fun experimenting in the kitchen.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I can tell! Your cooking skills are awesome. Seen any good movies lately?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Not recently. Any good ones you'd recommend?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I just watched "Little Women" and it was amazing! It's a great story about sisterhood, love, and reaching for your dreams. Definitely a must-see!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Oh, that sounds like a great one! I'll definitely add it to my list. Thanks for the recommendation!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Anytime! I'm always down to give movie reccomendations.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Good to know! I'll be sure to give you a shout whenever I run out of things to watch!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Sounds great! Let me know what you think of it when your done!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: You bet! You'll be the first to know.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Awesome! Enjoy yourself!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: You too, take care!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Later, take care!

Session.Summary: Nate apologized for not being around, mentioning making ice cream for a friend at 1:07 pm on 25 February, 2022. Joanna expressed interest in Nate's ice cream, but mentioned being unable to have dairy. Nate offered to share a dairy-free recipe with Joanna. They discussed Joanna's new screenplay about self-discovery and loss, with Nate showing interest in the storyline. Joanna revealed it was inspired by personal experiences. Nate praised Joanna's courage and expressed excitement about both her new screenplay and the first one. Joanna hoped her screenplay would get noticed and thanked Nate for his support, with Nate wishing her luck.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna starts writing her second screenplay, which is about a thirty year old woman on a journey of self-discovery during a road trip after a loss, inspired by her own experiences.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate gifts his friend a homemade ice cream batch of chocolate and vanilla swirl and his friend enjoys it.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna! Sorry I haven't been around. I made my friend some ice cream and they loved it!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: No worries, Nate! Glad to hear it. What flavor did you make?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I whipped up some chocolate and vanilla swirl.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a person holding a chocolate and vanilla ice cream cone

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: That looks delicious! Unfortunately, I can't have dairy, so no ice cream for me. Do you happen to have a dairy-free recipe that I could try?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Sure, I know one recipe using coconut milk. Would you like me to send it to you?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yeah, definitely! I'm keen to try your recipe. Always up for something sweet.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Cool, I'll do that. I'm all about these desserts, let me know what you think!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Definitely keeping you posted! Love your creations!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks, Joanna! It means a lot that you enjoy the desserts I bake.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yeah Nate, your cooking is amazing! I can't stop thinking about the screenplay, so I just started writing another one while I wait to hear back about how the first one did.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I hear that, taking your mind of something like that is very challenging. What's the new one about?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: It's about a thirty year old woman on a journey of self-discovery after a loss. Somewhat similar to the last one, but hey, that's just the kind of thing I'm inspired to write about!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Interesting! That's a deep topic. Love to hear more about it.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! It's my own story. The main character is dealing with some tough stuff: loss and trying to figure out who they are. They take a road trip to heal and grow.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow, Joanna, that sounds awesome. I love stories that tackle important issues. What inspired you to this one?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! It was inspired by personal experiences and my own journey of self-discovery.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow, Joanna, that takes guts! I can't wait to see it all come together. I'm also pumped to see how your first one will do!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! Appreciate your support. Hoping my screenplay gets noticed and makes it to the screen. Fingers crossed!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Crossing my fingers for you! Hope your screenplay finds a fan and is given its due. Good luck!

Session.Summary: Joanna and Nate caught up at 6:59 pm on 18 March, 2022. Joanna shared her mixed emotions about finishing her second script while Nate encouraged her to believe in herself. They discussed the calming effects of Nate's pet turtles, but Joanna, allergic to certain animals, couldn't get pets. They talked about Joanna's script and the importance of hard work and support. Nate assured Joanna of his ongoing support as they signed off at the end of their conversation.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna finishes writing her second screenplay, which is about a woman's journey of self-discovery through a road trip after suffering loss.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate takes his two pet turtles out for a walk.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate, it's been a minute! I wrapped up my second script, and the feels have been wild. Sometimes I'm so relieved, but other times I just feel anxious about what comes next. It's a mix of excitement and terror, thinking about my work getting noticed and hitting the big screen.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna! Awesome to hear from you! Congrats on wrapping up a second one! All that hard work and dedication will definitely shine through and get noticed, no doubt. Hope you've been able to take some time to relax after everything!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks Nate! It's been a wild ride. I've been decompressing, but it's hard to switch off. There's always this tug-of-war of hope and doubt.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: It's normal to have doubts, but you've worked hard and put tons of passion into it. Believe in yourself and things will work out. Here, look at this cute pic - walking them always reminds me to enjoy the small stuff!
Turn.image_caption: a photography of two tortoises laying on the ground in a jungle

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: That pic's adorable! They always look so relaxed outside. What made you choose them as pets?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I'm drawn to turtles. They're unique and their slow pace is a nice change from the rush of life. They're also low-maintenance and calming. Check out this moment I snapped!
Turn.image_caption: a photography of three turtles sitting on rocks in a pond

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: They look so peaceful! It's amazing how these creatures bring so much calm and joy. Is taking care of them tough?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: No, not really. Just keep their area clean, feed them properly, and make sure they get enough light. It's actually kind of fun.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Sounds great! Having pets must be a wonderful experience.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Pets definitely bring tons of joy. They are always there for us and they're so cute! Relaxing with them is a great way to chill.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I wish I wasn't allergic! I would get two turtles today if I could! I found out recently I'm allergic to cockroaches as well, so who knows if I'll ever get a pet.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Sorry! Maybe there are other animals you could consider! In the meantime though, I'll be sure to send you pics of my turtles so you can still watch them grow without getting too close.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Great idea! I'm already really invested in those little guys!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Pets really seem to do that to everyone don't they! So, what about your script now? Any ideas for the next steps?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I've been doing my fair share of research and networking non-stop for it. It's tough, but I'm determined to make it happen.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Great idea! that should hopefully get some more eyes on it. Keep up the hard work!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks so much, Nate! Your support means a lot. I'll keep working at it and hopefully the next steps will become clearer soon.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Just make sure you don't quit - the path forward will show up soon. You got this!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Appreciated! I think just having someone to support me throughout the whole process is such a blessing. It gives me the motivation to keep pushing forward.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Glad to hear my support makes a difference, Joanna. I'm here for you!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Always good to hear! See you later!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a cinema ticket on a chair

Session.Summary: Nate and Joanna caught up at 1:43 pm on 24 March, 2022. Nate congratulated Joanna on her writing audition, which she found exciting but nerve-wracking. Nate encouraged Joanna and shared his intense experience in a video game tournament. Joanna advised Nate on pursuing writing by recommending reading widely and seeking feedback. Nate thanked Joanna for her advice and support, expressing determination to work hard. They both wished each other luck in their endeavors and said goodbye, vowing to keep striving for their dreams.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna has an audition for a writing opportunity and it goes alright.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate participates in another Counter Strike tournament.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna! Long time no talk, how's it going? Crazy stuff's been happening since we last chatted.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate! Been quite a ride - in a good way - had an audition yesterday for a writing gig.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Congrats! How did it go? Are you excited?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! It went alright. Mixed emotions - definitely excited but also a bit anxious. Keep those fingers crossed!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yeah, I get it. Mixed emotions are rough, but I have faith in you! Keep me posted - you got this!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! Your support means a lot. I'll make sure to keep you updated. Anything new on your end?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yeah actually - I'm currently participating in the video game tournament again and it's INTENSE! There's so much adrenaline flowing.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Best of luck in the tournament! It sounds like it would be difficult to go through so many days of intense gaming! This is my go-to place for writing inspiration. It helps me stay sharp and motivated.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a book shelf filled with books and magazines

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow, that's a lot of books. Do you have any advice for someone like me who wants to pursue writing?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Definitely! Read lots and try out different genres. Build a solid understanding of literature. Don't be afraid to write and share, even if it's just with friends. Practicing and gathering feedback will make you better. Have faith in yourself and continue following your writing dreams - it's tough but worth it.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks, Joanna. Really appreciate your help and kind words. I'm going to keep working hard on it and see what happens. Good luck with your project, I'm sure it will turn out great!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks Nate! Appreciate your kind words and support. Let's keep going for our dreams and work hard. Catch you later!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Bye Joanna! Take care!

Session.Summary: At 7:37 pm on 15 April 2022, Nate told Joanna he dyed his hair last week and invited her to see it. Joanna admired Nate's new hair color, and he explained he chose it to stand out. This inspired Joanna, who shared a story about a sunset she saw while hiking. They discussed upcoming plans, with Joanna focused on writing and Nate offering support. They agreed to stay in touch, with Nate suggesting they see each other soon. They bid goodbye, with Nate saying, "Take care."

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate dyes his hair purple and shows off to friends.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Jo, guess what I did? Dyed my hair last week - come see!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow, Nate! Can't wait to see it. Must feel so liberating! How're you feeling?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I'm so stoked about it! Check it out!
Turn.image_caption: a photography of a man with purple hair and glasses taking a selfie

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow, your new hair color looks amazing! What made you choose that shade? Tell me all about it!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks Jo! I picked this color because it's bright and bold - like me! I wanted to stand out from the regular options.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: That's amazing, Nate! Your boldness really inspired me. It reminded me of this gorgeous sunset I saw while hiking the other day. It made me realize the importance of showing the world who we are.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a street with a stop sign and a cloudy sky

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow, that sunset looks awesome! Jealous! I bet you had a great time. Are there any more exciting trips coming up for you?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I did! the sky was so gorgeous! Wish I had a vacation lined up, but right now my writing is consuming me. Hoping for some good news soon!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I understand, Joanna. Big projects can be so taxing. Keep me posted on how it goes, alright?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Cheers, Nate! Your support means a lot. I'll definitely keep you updated.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Sounds great, See you soon?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Totally! Bye Nate!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Take care!

Session.Summary: Nate and Joanna caught up at 6:44 pm on 17 April, 2022. They discussed reading books, hiking trails, and the calming effect of nature. Nate shared his love for his pets, including turtles, and his dairy-free ice cream recipe with Joanna. Joanna expressed interest in trying the recipe and promised to update Nate on the results.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna goes on a hike in her hometown.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna discovers a new hiking trail while hiking in her hometown.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna reads a lot of books from her collection.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna! Haven't talked with you in a while - how's it going?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate! Great to hear from you. I've been reading a lot in the past week! There's a lot of good books I forgot I owned.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Sounds fun! I probably also have loads of books I haven't read in years. Sounds like a blast from the past!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: It really is! On a different note, I found an awesome hiking trail in my hometown yesterday! It was gorgeous. Nature is so inspiring, and it's a great way to reset. Do you know of any good hiking spots?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I'm not really into hiking but I'm curious to see what the trail looks like! I heard there's a nice trail just north of where I live.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Maybe I'll have to convince you to go with me one of these times!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Maybe! I do like nature, so that might be fun going with someone else.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yeah, nature's awesome! I'm a huge fan of it, that's why I go!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Agreed, nature has a way of being so inspiring! I'm glad you found a way to reset and find peace in it.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Nature's always been my haven. Walking in it, feeling it, hearing the sounds - it's so calming. Worries and stress seem to vanish, and it's just me and the beauty around me.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: It's so crucial to find a little peace and remember life's beauty. For me, it's spending time with my pets and engaging in my hobbies; they let me take a break from reality. It's wild how small things can have such a powerful effect on our happiness, right?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yeah, Nate! Even the small things make life enjoyable and worth it. Taking time for your little friends and doing activities you love are like treasures that remind us how great and peaceful life is. We just gotta savor them!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Speaking of which, here they go again!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a turtle and a strawberry in a bowl

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: So cute! I love your turtles so much!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Me too! I love watching them play to simply enjoy the peaceful moments of life. Sometimes I even bring them in the kitchen so they can watch me make food like this!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a bowl of ice cream and a bowl of sprinkles

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I love your icecream so much! I wish I could make it the way you do!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks! It's dairy-free and so easy. Wanna get the recipe?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Sure! I'm lactose intolerant, so I'll just need the dairy-free recipe!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: No prob. I made it with coconut milk, vanilla extract, sugar, and a pinch of salt. After chilling it in the fridge, I put it in the ice cream maker and froze it until it was scoopable.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow, sounds delicious! I'm going to try making it tonight! Thank you for sharing the recipe!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna, glad I could help. Let me know how it turns out!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Got it, Nate. I'll definitely let you know how it turns out. Thanks for sharing the recipe!

Session.Summary: At 7:44 pm on 21 April, 2022, Joanna informed Nate about joining a writers group that has been motivating and inspiring her. She is currently working on a script titled "Finding Home." Nate shared his excitement for an upcoming gaming tournament, and they discussed their passions for writing, acting, and favorite movies and book series. Joanna planned to check out the book series recommended by Nate and expressed interest in possibly getting back to acting in the future. The conversation ended with warm goodbyes and well-wishes.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna joins a local writers group with inspiring individuals who motivate and support her writing.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna starts working on a script called "Finding Home" with the local writers group on a girl who is trying to find her true home.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate gears up for a local Street Fighter tournament which will be his fourth video game tournament.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate! Long time no talk! I wanted to tell ya I just joined a writers group. It's unbelievable--such inspirational people who really get my writing. I'm feeling so motivated and supported, it's like I finally belong somewhere!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a notebook with a notepad and a piece of paper

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna! That's awesome! Having a supportive group around you can really make a difference. What kind of projects are you working on with them?
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a cup of ice cream with a cherry on top

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! We've made some great progress. I'm working on one with my group called "Finding Home." It's a script about a girl on a journey to find her true home. I find it really rewarding and emotional. What about you? Any upcoming gaming tournaments?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hi Joanna! "Finding Home" sounds really special. Must be so meaningful to work on. I've got a gaming tournament next month and I'm feeling good about it. It's gonna be my 4th one!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yeah, I bet the nerves and excitement are quite a rush! I remember when I did my first play, I was so nervous I forgot my lines. It was embarrassing, but it taught me how important it is to prepare and stay in the moment.
Turn.image_caption: a photography of a man in a striped suit is performing on stage

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Sounds like you had an interesting time on stage! It's always a learning experience. Have you ever considered going back to acting? Is that you in the photo?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yeah, that's me in that photo! Acting was my first passion, but now I really shine in writing. It helps me express myself in a new way, but who knows, maybe I'll go back to acting someday. Never say never!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Go for it! Follow your passion for writing, but if acting really makes you happy, give it a shot as well. Who knows what'll happen! Any particular movies that spark your writing?
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a turtle laying on a bed of rocks and gravel

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks Nate! I'm gonna keep writing, but if acting calls out I might give it a try. I really enjoy dramas and emotionally-driven films. What about you? What inspires your passion?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I love fantasy and sci-fi movies, they're a great escape and get my imagination going. Playing video games is a great way to express my creativity and passion.
Turn.image_caption: a photography of a black xbox controller sitting on top of a wooden table

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: That's awesome! I love how video games can really spark your imagination. Do you have a favorite fantasy or sci-fi movie?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yeah, for sure! This trilogy is one of my faves. The world building, battles, and storytelling always blow me away!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a shelf with a lot of books on it

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow, that's great to hear! What books do you enjoy? I'm always up for some new book recommendations.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I love this series. It has adventures, magic, and great characters - it's a must-read!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a bunch of books on a table

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Heard of that series! It's been on my list forever. Thanks for the recommendation, Nate. I'm definitely going to check it out!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: No problem, glad to see an interest. Let me know what you think when you check it out.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks Nate! I'll definitely let you know my thoughts. Take care and have a great day!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: See you! Good chatting with you! Have a great day!

Session.Summary: Joanna and Nate caught up on 2nd May at 11:54 am. Joanna told Nate she enjoyed watching "The Lord of the Rings" Trilogy on his recommendation, and Nate agreed it's a great trilogy. Nate shared he has been focused on gaming, winning his second tournament in Street Fighter. Joanna praised Nate's gaming room and his recent success in tournaments. Nate appreciated Joanna's dairy-free dessert creations and they discussed their creative outlets. Nate encouraged Joanna to keep experimenting in the kitchen. They ended the conversation with Joanna saying she will continue trying new things and Nate bidding her goodbye.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna watches the Lord of the Rings trilogy movies based on Nate's recommendation and enjoys it.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna makes a dairy-free vanilla with strawberry filling and coconut cream frosting and appreciates the coconut recommendation from Note.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate wins the local Street Fighter tournament which is his second win in video game tournaments.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate, how's it going? I took your reccomendation and watched "The Lord of the Rings" Trilogy last night! It was awesome!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a person holding a book openhemer

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Glad to hear you enjoyed it! It's probably the greatest trilogy of all time! As for me, life's been ok, just taking care of this.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a gaming room with a computer and a gaming chair

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow, Nate! I'm proud of what you did. Your gaming room looks great - have you been gaming a lot recently?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Gaming has been my focus - practicing a lot and even winning a few tournaments. Last week I won my second tournament!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a woman with purple hair and a black dress

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow, congrats! What game were you playing?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks! I usually play CS:GO, but I tried my hand at the local Street Fighter tournament this time since I play that game a lot with my friends, and turns out I'm really good!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Nice! That must have been a surprise. How did it feel to finally win one?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: It was super awesome! So much adrenaline went into that last match, and the other finalist even shook my hand! Enough about me though, how about you? What have you been up to?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Not much is new other than the screenplay. Been working on some projects and testing out dairy-free dessert recipes for friends and fam. Here's a pic of a cake I made recently!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a cake with white frosting on a wooden table

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: That looks really good! I love the way the frosting turned out!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks! It's dairy-free vanilla with strawberry filling and coconut cream frosting. I gotta say, I really like your coconut reccomendation you gave a while back!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow, Joanna, that looks amazing! I bet it tastes great - you're so talented at making dairy-free desserts!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks Nate! I really appreciate it. I love experimenting in the kitchen, coming up with something tasty. Cooking and baking are my creative outlets. Especially when I'm snackin' dairy-free, trying to make the desserts just as delicious - it's a rewarding challenge! Seeing the smiles on everyone's faces when they try it - it's a total win!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: That's great, Joanna! It must be so rewarding to see everyone enjoying your creations. Keep up the good work!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! Appreciate all the help. Gonna keep trying new things. See ya later!

Session.Summary: Joanna and Nate conversed at 3:35 pm on 12 May, 2022. Joanna shared her exciting hiking experience at Whispering Falls with Nate, who admired her photo and expressed interest in joining her on a hike in the future. They discussed how nature inspires creativity, with Joanna mentioning how hiking has transformed her and Nate considering writing a screenplay. They concluded their conversation with plans to go on a hike together in the future.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna becomes an expert hiker after discovering and exploring several trails in her hometown.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna finds a spot with waterfall called the 'Whispering Falls' during one of her hikes.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate! Great to hear from you! Quite a week since we last talked - something awesome happened to me!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Jo! Great hearing from you! What happened?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I went hiking and found some more amazing trails in my town. It was such an awesome experience! I think I am an expert hiker now.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Sounds great, Jo! Happy you had an awesome experience. Did you happen to take any photos of it?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yeah, I did! Loved this spot on the hike. The rush of the water was so soothing.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a waterfall with a dark sky in the background

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow, looks great! Where did you take this picture? I love the dark sky and green scenery.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks! I took this photo at a beautiful location called Whispering Falls. It was really peaceful and serene.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I wish I could have been there! Your hikes sound like a blast.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: It was awesome, Nate. The sound of that place and the beauty of nature made me so calm and peaceful. Everything else faded away and all that mattered was the present.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: That's great. Glad you found a spot that calms you down - nature sure can be a break from the craziness.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Nature totally inspires me and it's so calming to be surrounded by its beauty. Hiking has opened up a whole new world for me and I feel like a different person now.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow, Jo, that's really cool! It's great to have something that gets those creative juices flowing.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I always feel like I could write a whole movie when I'm out there in cool places like that!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow! That's really cool that it inspires you that much! For me I just get deep in thought and think about my life or new recipes.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I think about my life too sometimes when I'm out and about, but there was something special about these trails that made me feel like writing a drama.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey, we should go together sometime, don't you think? Maybe I'll start to think of a drama myself and publish my own screenplay.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Haha, now that would be something! Sure, you should come down and join me on the trails sometime!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Sounds like a plan! Thanks for the invite Joanna!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Sure thing Nate! See you later!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: See ya!

Session.Summary: Nate and Joanna caught up at 7:49 pm on 20 May, 2022. Nate shared about his new adopted pet, Max, bringing joy to his life. Joanna, allergic to pets, finds solace in writing and creative projects. She showed Nate her latest work on loss and identity, appreciated his support, and valued their friendship. Nate commended Joanna for her bravery in exploring personal topics. The conversation ended with mutual encouragement to pursue dreams and talents.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna find the guts to start writing her third screenplay on loss, identity, and connection based on a story she has had since ages.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate adopts a new dog named Max as an addition to his pet family that consisted of two turtles.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna! How've you been? Been a busy week since we talked.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate! Just finished something - pretty wild journey!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Way to go! I just got a new addition to the family, this is Max!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a dog laying on a couch in a living room

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow, he's adorable! How long have you had him? I can see why you're thrilled!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks! It's awesome - he's adopted and so full of energy, and he's filling my life with so much joy. He's even keeping my other pets active.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Pets sure do make life better! Glad Max is bringing you lots of joy.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yep, totally! Pets make us so much happier and never let us down. Have you thought any more of getting one of your own?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Unfortunately, allergies make it so I don't really want to get any, and I'm too lazy to research alternative pets for my allergies.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Aww, that's unfortunate. It's nice seeing the joy pets bring to others, though. How do you find comfort when you don't have any?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Writing and creative projects are what get me through tough times. I'm also grateful for my supportive friends.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow, that's awesome! Those both can definitely be therapeutic. It's great to have such positive relationships that make such a great impact.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yeah. It's so nice to have friends who understand and appreciate my work - it's priceless being able to talk about it together and receive feedback. Here's a look at what I've been working on – it's been quite a journey, but I made it!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a notepad with a dog on it and a pen

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow, that looks great Joanna! Is that your third one?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yep! I chose to write about this because it's really personal. It's about loss, identity, and connection. It's a story I've had for ages but just got the guts to write it. It was hard, but I'm so proud of it.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: That sounds impressive. You really do like writing about sadness and loss don't you.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! Yeah I really do. I had to be vulnerable and dig deep into those topics. But I think meaningful stories come from personal experiences and feelings. It was scary, but I found that I write best when I'm being true to myself - even if it's hard.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Well done, Joanna! It takes guts to explore your experiences and feelings. I'm proud of you for staying strong and being true to yourself. Keep it up!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! Your support really means a lot. Knowing I've got people like you cheering me on makes this journey way easier.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: No worries, Joanna! Keep going and reach for your dreams. You've got tons of talent and potential!

Session.Summary: At 3:00 pm on 25 May 2022, Nate and Joanna caught up after a long time. Nate shared his encounter with a friendly couple during a walk with his dog, leading to plans for doggy playdates. Joanna expressed how uplifting connecting with other pet owners can be. They discussed the joy of watching their pets play and the importance of finding happiness in small things. Nate gifted Joanna a stuffed animal to bring her joy. They agreed that cherishing happy moments is crucial, especially during tough times. Joanna mentioned her screenplay and the role of joyful moments in making the journey worthwhile. Nate offered support and encouragement, emphasizing the importance of enjoying the journey and staying focused on dreams. Joanna valued Nate's support and promised to keep him updated on her progress.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate finds a companion for Max among his neighbors.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate gets a stuffed toy pup for Joanna since she is allergic to animals with fur and cannot have real animals as pets.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Jo! Been ages since we last talked. Here's something cool that happened the other day - I took Max for a walk and ran into this super nice couple who had a dog. It turns out they live close by. We decided to do doggy playdates, which is awesome considering we all need friends for our pets.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate! Great to hear from you. Sounds like a nice encounter on your walk. Connecting with others who have pets can be uplifting and rewarding.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: It's like fate. Having a walking buddy forMax will be great. He really likes the other dog too!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Awesome! Did you get to know the couple very well? What were they like?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: They actually didn't share a whole lot in common with me besides the love of animals, but I think that was all we needed to share in common to be good friends!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: That's really cool that you can just go out and meet people like that, keep it up Nate!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks! I just really enjoy watching our pets play with one another. Its like a dream come true seeing my dog so happy.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I can see why having a peaceful presence around could help relieve stress. Having someone or something to come home to for a sense of calm would be helpful for relaxation.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yep, Joanna. It's great! Looky here, I got this new pup for you!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a stuffed animal laying on a bed

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Awww! It's so cute! I love the thought Nate!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks! It's a stuffed animal to remind you of the good vibes.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: That's so sweet! I'll cherish that little guy with all my heart!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yeah! It's like having joy in your pocket. It always makes me grin when I look at it.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: That's great, Nate! Appreciate the small joys like that cute stuffed animal. It's a nice reminder!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Agreed, those little things sure do make life better!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I'll always remember those moments that bring us happiness and remind us that life is great!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Sure, Joanna! It's all about finding those little things and cherishing them, otherwise it's easy to get down!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thinking back to the tough times finishing my screenplay made me realize it's those moments that bring joy and make the journey worth it.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yeah, those little moments make it all worth it, especially during tough times. Enjoying the ride is key.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Appreciating the journey and being aware of those happy moments can be a game-changer! It keeps us focused on our dreams. Can't wait to show it to you. I value your opinion!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Can't wait to see it, Joanna! I'm here to support you.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! Your support is greatly appreciated. I'll make sure to keep you updated.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: No worries! You've got this. Keep it up!

Session.Summary: Joanna shared with Nate that she received a rejection letter for her screenplay, feeling discouraged. Nate comforted her, advising not to give up on her dreams. He encouraged her to stay positive and keep believing in herself. They discussed the generic rejection letter Joanna received without feedback. Nate shared his recent victory in a video game tournament, which boosted his confidence. Joanna congratulated him and admired his dedication to gaming. They expressed support for each other's endeavors and made plans for their respective weekends. Nate planned a gaming party and mentioned providing custom controller decorations for guests. Joanna wished him the best for the party, and they parted ways, each looking forward to their own activities.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna's receives a generic rejection letter without much feedback from a major company for her first screenplay on drama and romance.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna explores a new hiking trail with her friends

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna finishes writing her third screenplay, which is based on a story of loss, identity and connection.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate wins another regional video game tournament.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate plans to host a gaming party and invites people he met at the regional video game tournament as well as friends from other tournaments he has attended.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate gets custom controller decorations for everyone attending the gaming party he plans on hosting.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Nate, after finishing my screenplay I got a rejection letter from a major company. It really bummed me out.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Sorry to hear that, Joanna. Rejection stinks, but it doesn't mean you're not talented. Don't give up on your dreams!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate. It can feel like a step back sometimes. But I appreciate your kind words and encouragement.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Sure, just make sure you keep going and believing in yourself. Did something happen with the company?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: They just sent me a generic rejection letter without much feedback. It's disheartening not knowing why it didn't work out.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Ugh, that's so frustrating. But don't get discouraged, just keep going.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yeah, you're right. I won't let this bring me down. Thanks for your support. What have you been up to lately?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I've been doing great - I just won another regional video game tournament last week! It was so cool, plus I met some new people. Connecting with fellow gamers is always awesome.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Way to go, Nate! Congratulations on your victory in the tournament! It must feel great to be recognized for your gaming skills.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks, Joanna! Winning was a huge confidence boost and shows my hard work paid off. I'm really happy with my progress.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I am as well! It's great to hear from you about your tournaments throughout the years!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks! I has been a while since my first tournament hasn't it? I appreciate your support!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Anytime Nate! I'm here for you every step of the way.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I talked to some of the guys at the tournament afterwards, and they said they wanted to hang out later!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a purple and blue controller with a star field design

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Sounds like fun! It's good to have friends that share your interests!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: For sure! They asked for some tips in how to improve their game, so I said I could help.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Good on you for helping strangers out! Stepping outside your comfort zone is always great.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks, I just like helping people. Do you have any plans for the weekend?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yep, I'm hiking with some buddies this weekend. We're checking out a new trail with a rad waterfall. Can't wait! Do you have any fun plans?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Sounds great! Have fun with that. I'm organizing a gaming party two weekends later - it'll be hectic but fun!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Oh? Are you going to invite your tournament friends?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Definitely! And some old friends and teamates from other tournaments.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Sounds like fun, Nate! I wish you the best on your party. Have a blast!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks Joanna! I'm sure it'll be a blast. I'm even getting everyone custom controller decorations just for coming!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow, I bet they'll love that! What a sweet idea.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I know right? Have a great hike. Take lots of pics! See ya later!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks Nate! See you later!

Session.Summary: On June 5th, 2022, at 2:12 pm, Joanna excitedly shared with Nate that her screenplay bits were on the big screen, feeling inspired but nervous. Nate congratulated her, mentioning her Spider-Man pin. They discussed their favorite superheroes, with Joanna loving Spider-Man for his struggles and Nate admiring Iron Man for his tech and humor. They both found inspiration in their favorite things, with Joanna's cork board filled with motivation. Nate expressed interest in making his own cork board and they bid each other goodbye.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna is inspired to see a movie that she helped write appear on the big screen.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate! Yesterday was crazy cool - I wrote a few bits for a screenplay that appeared on the big screen yesterday! It was nerve-wracking but so inspiring to see my words come alive!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a spider - man poster hanging on a wall

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Congrats, Joanna! Seeing your hard work pay off like that must've felt amazing. I bet it was scary too, but awesome! You're so inspiring. By the way, last time we saw eachother, I noticed a spiderman pin on your purse. Is Spider-Man your favorite superhero, or do you have another fave?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! It was a real roller coaster, but seeing the hard work pay off was amazing. Spider-Man has always been a favorite of mine - I mean, who doesn't love Peter Parker's struggles between being a hero and being a person? But I'm kind of a sucker for any superhero - everyone has their own rad story and powers. Do you have a favorite superhero?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: That's great, Joanna! Iron Man is my top pick. I love his tech and that sarcastic humor. Seeing these figures just makes me feel invincible!
Turn.image_caption: a photography of a toy iron man standing on a white surface

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow, Nate! That's awesome. I love the tech and funny jokes of Iron Man too. What made you get that figure?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks Joanna! I got it because it reminded me of something I love. Its presence in my room is a good reminder to keep working on my goals. Any inspiring things in your room?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: My cork board is full of inspiring quotes and pictures for motivation and creativity. It's my little corner of inspiration.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow Joanna, that sounds great! Could you show me a picture of it?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Here ya go, a pic of my cork board. It's got quotes, photos, and little keepsakes.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a picture frame with a picture of a family

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: That's a great pic of your family! What made you hang it on your cork board?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! Having that picture on my cork board reminds me of the love and encouragement from them every day.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: That's great, Joanna. Family support is invaluable. It's so good to have those reminders.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Absolutely, it means a lot and keeps me going.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I really should start a cork board of my own shouldn't I. That seems like a really valuable thing!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I would definitely recommend it! As long as your willing to explain what it is to your friends.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Of course! Well see you later Joanna!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Bye Nate!

Session.Summary: Joanna and Nate caught up at 10:55 am on 24 June, 2022. Joanna submitted her screenplay to a film contest, and Nate's gaming party was successful. Nate shared about making vegan ice cream and Joanna wanted the recipe. They agreed to share it the next day. Joanna planned to make it for her family. Nate offered support, and Joanna promised to keep him updated. Nate wished her a great day and told her to take care.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna submits her third screenplay on loss, identity and connection to a film contest

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate makes vegan ice cream and shares with the vegan diet group he is part of.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate, long time no see! How have you been? I just got done submitting my recent screenplay to a film contest just to see how others might like it!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: That's really cool Joanna! I hope it does well, and I've been doing great! The gaming party was a great success! We even played some Chess afterward just for fun.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Nice! Did your friends like the controller accessories?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Most of them did! I can't say if all of them will continue to use them or not, but that's beside the point.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yeah Nate, you're right. It doesn't matter if they use it, its the thought that matters right?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Absolutely! There were 7 people that attended, and 6 of them said they'd want to do it again next month!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: That sounds like a huge success then! Congrats!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks! On another note, I made vegan ice cream last Friday and shared it with some people in my vegan diet group. It was awesome!
Turn.image_caption: a photography of a group of people sitting on a bench

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Mm, yum! Can you give me the recipe for that? It sounds like it'd be a good recipe!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Sure thing! I can give it to you tomorrow, how does that sound?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Awesome! I'm going to make it for my family this weekend - can't wait!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Nice one, Joanna! Hope you and your family like it. Let me know how it went!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Sure thing! They love it when I make them new things!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Then I have no doubt they'll love the icecream!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks Nate! Your support is greatly appreciated. I'll make sure to keep you updated.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Can't wait to hear about it. Have a great day! Take care.

Session.Summary: Nate shared his recent victory in a video game tournament, winning for the fourth time and being proud to make money doing what he loves. Joanna congratulated him, mentioning her road trip to Woodhaven during his tournament. Nate showed interest in her discoveries, and Joanna talked about finding an old book with stories and sketches that inspired her next script. They exchanged words of encouragement and support, with Nate praising Joanna's talent and Joanna expressing excitement about her new script and book. Nate encouraged her to believe in herself and her talent. Joanna appreciated his support and stated her determination to continue working hard.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna takes a road trip to a small Midwestern town Woodhaven for research on her next movie script and is inspired by the history of the town and its interesting people.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna starts writing a book on a deep and emotional story after seeing the movie she helped co-write do well.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate wins his fourth video game tournament

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna, check this out! I won my fourth video game tournament on Friday! It was awesome competing and showing off my skills - and the victory was indescribable. I'm really proud that I can make money doing what I love. This one was online!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a television screen showing a trophy and a trophy

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Congrats, Nate! That's awesome! So proud of you. Your hard work really paid off - keep it up! BTW, I took a road trip for research for my next movie while you were winning. Much-needed break and a chance to explore new places and get inspired.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks, Joanna! Your support means a lot to me. That road trip sounds great! Where did you go? Did you discover any interesting places?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks Nate! Appreciate your kind words. I went to Woodhaven, a small town in the Midwest. Got to see some lovely scenery and historic buildings. Checked out the library there, it had a cool old book collection!
Turn.image_caption: a photography of a book shelf filled with lots of books

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: That place looks interesting! Did you find any cool books there?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I stumbled upon this super cool book from the 1900s with stories and sketches - so awesome to read about the town and the people living there!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a book with writing on it and a pen

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: That sounds really interesting! Anyting specific stick out to you about it?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Woodhaven has had an interesting past with lots of cool people. Seeing how much it changed sparked ideas for my next script.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Real-life stories are the best for inspiration. Can't wait to hear about your next one. Keep it up!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! I'm stoked about this new script. It's different from my previous work, but it has the potential to be something awesome! I'll be sure to keep you posted.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I'm sure it will do just as well as your last one! Keep on trying and believe in yourself!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! Your encouragement really means a lot to me. You're the best for supporting me in my writing journey.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I'm always here for you! You've got so much talent, just keep going for it!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I will! I actually started on a book recently since my movie did well!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a person holding a notebook with a handwritten page

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Nice! I'm curious, what is it about?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: That page specifically has some dialogues exploring loss, redemption, and forgiveness. It's a deep and emotional story that I'm really excited about!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow, Joanna! It sounds awesome. I'm so excited to see how it all plays out!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! I'm so glad you're excited. I've never really tried publishing a book, but this might be the first!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Good luck on that! I'm sure people will recognise you as the same author of the movie you got published and love the book even more.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! Your belief in me means a lot. I'll keep doing my best. Thanks for the support!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: No problem, Joanna. I'm here for you. Your hard work will pay off, I promise. Believe in yourself and your talent - you're incredible!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a person holding a small turtle in a container

Session.Summary: Joanna and Nate caught up at 6:12 pm on 14 August, 2022. Joanna shared her passion for writing as a form of solace and creativity, mentioning how it has become her escape. Nate found her writing inspiring and mentioned how words have a healing power. Joanna also talked about a touching moment when her writing had a positive impact on someone, making her realize the power of words. Nate started teaching people how to make dairy-free desserts and shared a new recipe with Joanna. She expressed excitement to try it and thanked him for sharing. They ended the conversation wishing each other well.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna is reminded of why she loves writing after she receives a letter from one of the readers of her blog post on how her words brought them comfort.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate starts teaching others how to make coconut milk ice cream.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate, long time no talk! I've been busy with writing projects and really going all out with it. It's been the best thing ever - a mix of highs and lows - and my journal's pretty much my rock. Writing's such a huge part of me now.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a notebook with a bunch of stickers on it

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna! Great to hear it! It's amazing how much a certain activity can become a part of our lives. Keep it up, you're inspiring! Is writing your way to solace and creativity?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yeah, definitely. Writing has become like an escape and a way to express my feelings. It gives me a chance to put all my thoughts and feelings down and make something good out of it. Words just have a magical way of healing.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a handwritten letter from a man who is holding a piece of paper

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: That's really cool, I like it! It's incredible how words can turn something sad into something special. I'm glad it worked for you. Anything cool happening recently?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yep. Last week, someone wrote me a letter after reading an online blog post I made about a hard moment in my life. Their words touched me; they said my story had brought them comfort. It was awesome to realize my words had that kind of power. It reminded me why I love writing.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a note written to a person on a piece of paper

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Nice work, Joanna! That must feel sureal. Keep it up - you're changing lives!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! Really appreciate your kind words. It's knowing that my writing can make a difference that keeps me going, even on tough days. So glad to have this outlet to share my stories and hopefully have an impact. How about you? Anything new since we last talked?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks, Joanna! Your words mean a lot. Since we last spoke, I started teaching people how to make this. Sharing my love for dairy-free desserts has been fun and rewarding.
Turn.image_caption: a photography of a dessert with whipped cream and chocolate sauce

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yum, Nate! I love it when you make coconut milk icecream, it's so good!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I've been really into making this lately - it's creamy, rich, dairy-free and a new recipe! Wanna try it? I can share the recipe with you if you'd like!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I'd love to try it! Thanks for sharing your love for dairy-free desserts. I really appreciate it!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: No problem, Joanna! Always happy to share them with you. Sending you the recipe now!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! Can't wait to surprise my family with something delicious!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: No problem, Joanna! Wish them luck! Let me know how it goes. Have a blast baking!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate. I'll keep you posted. Have a great day.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: You too!

Session.Summary: Nate informed Joanna at 10:57 am on 22 August, 2022, that he won an international gaming tournament and is now able to pursue his passion as a career. Joanna congratulated Nate for his victory and praised him for turning his passion into a profession. They discussed Nate's pet turtles' new tank and Joanna sharing her writing with a group, both feeling proud of their achievements. Nate emphasized the importance of self-care and taking breaks, which Joanna agreed on. They exchanged book recommendations before wishing each other a good day and taking care.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna shares her new book on a deep and emotional story with her local writers group for feedback.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna makes a dairy-free parfait to celebrate getting positive feedback from her local writers group about her book.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna plans to relax and recharge by taking a long walk on the beach and reading books over the weekend.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate enters and wins an international video game tournament, and is now able to make a living out of his passion.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate gets a new tank for his two turtles.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate plans to take some time off to chill with his pet dog and turtles.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Woah Joanna, I won an international tournament yesterday! It was wild. Gaming has brought me so much success and now I'm able to make a living at something I'm passionate about - I'm loving it.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Congrats, Nate! So proud of you for winning that tournament, that's awesome! Must feel great to turn your passion into a career.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I'm really stoked to see all my hard work paying off! I'm super proud of what I accomplished. On another note, my little dudes got a new tank! Check them out, they're so cute, right?!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a fish tank with a fish inside of it

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow Nate, they're adorable! I can see why you enjoy spending time with them. It looks like they have so much more room to swim now!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: They're my little buddies, always calm and peaceful. It makes coming home after a long day of gaming better. The tank expansion has made them so happy! How have you been?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I'm good! Was super nervous last week when I shared my book with my writers group but got some great feedback. My hard work is paying off, it's such an awesome feeling!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a desk with a chair and a computer

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow Jo, you're killing it! Getting this kind of feedback means people are really connecting with your writing. Pretty cool! Did you celebrate?
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a dessert in a glass on a counter

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! It feels great knowing that people like my writing. I celebrated by making this delicious treat - yum! Any plans for the weekend?
Turn.image_caption: a photo of two desserts with spoons and a bar of chocolate

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I'm taking some time off this weekend to chill with my pets. Anything cool happening with you?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I'm relaxing and recharging this weekend with a long walk and some reading. It's a good break.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Looks like we both need a break. I'm glad your able to find a way to recharge! It's so incredibly important to take time off!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! I've learned that taking breaks and looking after myself are important for my inspiration and mental health. It's all about finding balance.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yeah, balance is key! It's so cool how taking care of ourselves helps us be more creative and happier. I'm always looking for something new to read. Got any book recommendations? I've got a lot of books to choose from.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a bookcase filled with books and a toy car

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I reccomend finding a fantasy book series to read through. Most fiction series are great reads when your trying to relax.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Good idea! How about this series?
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a stack of books sitting on top of a wooden table

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: That's a great one! Let me know what you think when your finished!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Sure thing! And since your recommending me a book, I thought I should do the same! I'd really recommend this series. It's got awesome battles and interesting characters.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a poster of a man falling off a cliff

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow, that series looks awesome! I'll have to check it out sometime!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: You really should! The action scenes are awesome and the plot rocks. Definitely one of my favorites!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow, sounds great! I'll definitely add it to my list; thanks for the recommendation!
