Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Enjoy it! Have a good day.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! You too! Have a great day. Take care.

Session.Summary: At 6:03 pm on 5 September 2022, Nate and Joanna catch up after a while. Nate mentions turtles, a setback in a video game tourney, and trying to stay positive. Joanna shares she revised an old recipe and made something new. Nate admires her dessert and asks how she is doing. Joanna mentions finding comfort in cooking. They discuss Joanna's experimentation with dairy-free dessert options like chocolate, raspberry, and coconut. Nate appreciates her inclusive approach and looks forward to more recipes. Joanna plans to share more recipes and seeks Nate's advice on dairy-free baking, to which Nate suggests substitutes like dairy-free margarine or coconut oil. They express excitement to cook together in the future. Joanna thanks Nate for his ideas and they say goodbye, with Joanna expressing her gratitude and looking forward to trying Nate's suggestions.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna revises her dairy free recipe for chocolate strawberry cake.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate faces a setback because he doesn't do too well in a video game tournament.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna! Long time no talk. So much has happened. Look how cute they are! Hanging with them has been a big help, especially recently. Speaking of which, I just had a letdown in a video game tourney - I didn't do too great, even though I tried. It was a setback, but I'm trying to stay positive.
Turn.image_caption: a photography of two turtles sitting on a rock in a pond

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate! Cute turtles! Bummer about the setback. Any positive vibes comin' your way? I just revised on of my old recipes and made this!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a piece of cake with strawberries and chocolate

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna, yeah it's a bummer that I didn't do well. But it's all part of the learning curve, you know? Also that looks super good! Anyways, how are you holding up?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I'm doing OK, thanks. Just been tinkering with that recipe and a few others. It's helping me find some comfort and getting creative.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: What else are you making? It's always satisfying to see the kind of things you do when your in one of those moods!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Been tweaking a dessert recipe to make it yummier and more accessible.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow, that sounds great! What flavors are you experimenting with?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Trying out different flavors like chocolate, raspberry, and coconut has been a blast!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Sounds delicious! Are you only trying dairy-free options?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yeah, since I'm lactose intolerant I'm trying out dairy-free options like coconut or almond milk instead. It's been a fun challenge seeing how to make yummy treats that suit everyone's diets. I even made these dairy-free chocolate coconut cupcakes with raspberry frosting.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a plate of cupcakes with different toppings

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Woah, those look great, Joanna! It's cool that you make desserts that work for everyone's diets. Do you have any more yummy recipes hiding in there?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yep! I've been making all sorts of desserts that work for everyone's diets - cookies, pies, cakes - everything! I'll share more recipes with you soon.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Can't wait to try them. Can I join you sometime? I think baking and cooking really brings us together!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a pile of cookies with sprinkles on a wooden table

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yeah, Nate! A fellow Chef in the kitchen is always a great help! Speaking of which, i'm curious, any more tips for dairy-free baking?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: You can use stuff like dairy-free margarine or coconut oil instead of butter, and make sure to check the labels to ensure they're dairy-free. Good luck!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! Love your ideas, can't wait to try them out!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a cookie with chocolate drizzle and almonds

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: No problem! I love to help, so just shoot me a question anytime you need!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Got it Nate, I'll see you soon!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Bye Joanna! Good luck!

Session.Summary: At 1:43 pm on 14 September 2022, Joanna and Nate caught up, where Joanna shared her laptop crash frustration and Nate recommended backups. Nate shared his experience teaching vegan ice cream recipes on a cooking show. They discussed dairy-free desserts, with Joanna sharing a chocolate raspberry tart recipe and Nate favoring coconut milk ice cream. Joanna also mentioned a dairy-free chocolate cake and a blueberry dessert. They ended their chat on a friendly note, with Joanna offering to share more recipes and Nate expressing gratitude.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna loses her work after her laptop crashes.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate hosts a cooking show to teach people how to make vegan ice cream using coconut milk.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate, long time no see! My laptop crashed last week and I lost all my work - super frustrating! As a writer, my laptop is like half of my lifeline so losing all progress was like a major blow.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna, sorry to hear about that. Losing so much progress must be really frustrating. Did you manage to recover anything? Maybe consider backing up your work in the future?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks for the sympathy, Nate. Nothing was recoverable, but now I have an external drive for backups. I never want to go through this again. So, how have you been? Making anything cool?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna, I'm no writer like you, but something pretty awesome happened. Last Monday I got to teach people vegan ice cream recipes on my own cooking show! It was a bit nerve-wracking to put myself out there, but it was a blast. Plus, I picked up a few new recipes!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Way to go, Nate! Congrats on the cooking show, I'll definitely be tuning in! What's your favorite dish from the show?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Coconut milk ice cream is at the top of my list. It's so smooth and creamy with a tropical coconut twist. Plus, it's dairy-free for people who can't have lactose or who want vegan options. Here's a snap of the ice cream I made.
Turn.image_caption: a photography of a bowl of ice cream with a spoon on a table

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow, that looks amazing, Nate! I love the color and texture. It's great that you're making these options. Could you share the recipe? I'd love to try making it sometime!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yeah sure! Would love to share it. Let's spread the joy of dairy-free options! Let me know when you make it!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Cool, Nate! Gonna give it a go. Dairy-free is a must for me, especially for desserts. Last Friday, I made a deeeelish dessert with almond milk - it was good! Got any favs when it comes to dairy-free desserts?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Coconut milk ice cream is one of my favorites as you might be able to tell, but I also love a dairy-free chocolate mousse. It's super creamy and tastes like the real thing. What's been your favorite dairy-free sweet treat so far?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate, my favorite dairy-free treat is this amazing chocolate raspberry tart. It has an almond flour crust, chocolate ganache, and fresh raspberries - it's delicious!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a chocolate tart with raspberries on top

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: That looks amazing, Joanna! I need to try baking that. What other treats do you like making?
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a piece of chocolate cake with raspberries on a plate

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate, I love making this dairy-free chocolate cake with raspberries. It's so moist and delicious - perfect sweetness level.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a piece of chocolate cake with raspberries on a plate

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: That cake looks amazing, Joanna! How did you make it?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I make it with almond flour, coconut oil, chocolate and raspberries. It's my favorite for birthdays and special days.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yum, Joanna! Gotta try that one. Any others you want to share?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate! Here's another recipe I like. It's a delicious dessert made with blueberries, coconut milk, and a gluten-free crust. So creamy and delicious!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a piece of cake with walnuts on top

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow, Joanna! That dessert looks amazing. I'll definitely have to give it a try. Thanks!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Glad to help, Nate. Let me know if you try it. I'm sure you'll enjoy it. It was great chatting.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks Joanna! I will. Bye!

Session.Summary: Joanna and Nate, conversing at 11:15 am on 6 October, 2022, shared updates on their recent achievements and interests. Joanna talked about her successful dairy-free recipe while Nate mentioned winning a video game tournament and earning money. They discussed the joy of having extra cash, watching movies, and supporting each other's endeavors, with Nate even creating something special for Joanna. They both expressed pride and encouragement in each other's accomplishments and concluded by sharing their mutual love for DIY projects before saying goodbye.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna cooks her new dairy free recipe for chocolate raspberry tart for her family.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna finishes writing the book on a deep and emotional story that she started writing in July.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna makes a cute book mark for one the ladies at her local writing group

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate wins another video game tournament and makes a lot of money from it

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate, hi! Yesterday, I tried my newest dairy-free recipe and it was a winner with my family! Mixing and matching flavors is fun and I'm always trying new things. How about you?
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a tart with raspberries on a white plate

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna! That tart looks yummy! Lately, I've been doing great - I won a really big video game tournament last week and it was awesome! I still can't believe I made so much money from it.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a trophy and a game controller on a table

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Way to go, Nate! Winning the tournament and earning cash is awesome - congrats! Did you save it for something special?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks Joanna! Yeah, I saved some but I'm not sure what to do with it - I'm completely content already. I don't have big plans anyway, so it's nice to have the extra cash on hand.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: That's awesome, Nate! Having some extra cash on hand definitely brings a sense of freedom and relaxation, huh?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yes! Finally, I don't have to stress about it, so I can just enjoy my movies and games.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Taking breaks and reducing stress is pretty nice! Have you watched any good movies recently? I could use some recommendations!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I watched "Little Women" recently, and it was great! The acting was awesome and the story was so captivating. Definitely a good one!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I'm so glad you enjoyed it! I recommended it to you a while back. I watched it too and it really spoke to me. Themes like sisterhood, love, and chasing dreams were explored so well. By the way, I finished up my writing for my book last week. Put in a ton of late nights and edits but finally got it done. I'm so proud of it! Can't wait to see what happens next.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Way to go! We both know it took some effort, but I'm sure it'll be great. Congrats on finishing it up!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks Nate! Your words mean a lot. Dedication and late nights got me here, but it was worth it. Just like you with your recent tournament - hard work pays off. I appreciate your support throughout!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I'm always here for you, Joanna! You've worked so hard and accomplished a lot – I'm proud. Keep on going!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! I won't give up on my goals as long as your here to support me.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: You can always count on me! I even made this for you!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a white board with a drawing of arrows and words

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow, Nate, that looks awesome! What inspired you?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I figured you could always look back on this whenever you need encouragement, and that was all the inspiration I needed. And I would also say that your life path can be quite inspirational!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a young boy drawing on a white board

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow, Nate! That's sweet of you! I'll make sure to remember this when I need the encouragement the most.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Awesome! I know encouragement is what got me so far in my gameing career, so I figured why not share the love.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Rest assured, it will be something I cherish! On another note, I just finished this cute little bookmark for one of the ladies at my writing club!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a bookmark with a plant on top of it

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: That bookmark is great. I'm sure she'll love it!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks Nate! I absolutley love DIYs, and I know she does too.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Let me know how it goes!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Sure thing! Bye for now!

Session.Summary: Nate and Joanna spoke on 9 October, 2022, at 10:58 am. Nate shared his experience at a game convention where he met new people who shared his gaming interests. Joanna acknowledged the benefits of stepping out of comfort zones. They discussed how games can bond people and the impact of shared hobbies. Nate mentioned playing the game Catan at the convention, highlighting its competitive yet fun nature. Joanna appreciated the way games bring people together. They also talked about their favorite movies and games. Nate mentioned "Inception" and "Cyberpunk 2077," while Joanna enjoyed a classic movie. They discussed the escapism movies provide and the importance of creating a cozy space at home. Joanna suggested getting a comfortable couch, fluffy blankets, and dim lights for a cozy living room setup. Nate found the advice helpful and mentioned implementing it. The conversation ended with a friendly farewell.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna watches a classic movie that she rates 9 out of 10

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate visits a game convention and meets and interacts with new people from outside his circle who also play Catan.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate plans a gaming session with people he met at the game convention.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate watches the movie Inception

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate plays the game Cyberpunk 2077 non-stop

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna, it's been a couple days since we last talked. Something exciting happened last Friday. I went to a game convention and met new people who weren't from my normal circle. It was a bit overwhelming but it reminded me of the good times gaming can bring.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a man standing in front of a table with board games

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate! Good to hear from you. Sounds like fun! Meeting new people can be overwhelming, but the rewards can be great. Sometimes it's good to step outside our comfort zones and explore new things.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yeah, you're right! We can have great experiences if we take risks. I even made some friends at the convention who love games just like me. We already planned a gaming session together - it's cool to meet people who have the same interests!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of two people dressed up in costumes posing for a picture

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: That looks awesome! I'm glad you met people who share your interests - that definitely makes experiences more fun..

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I also met some people who also played this boardgame I love, so I joined in. We had a lot in common and hit it off. It's great when shared hobbies can bond people!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a group of people sitting around a table playing a board game

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: It's incredible how a game can bring people together and form strong relationships. Did you do anything else there?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: We played this game Catan - it's a great strategy game where you build settlements and trade resources. I love it!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a board game with a blue board and a yellow board

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Looks cool! Is it more of a competitive game or a more chill one?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: It can be both competitive and chill. We were competing, but still had lots of fun.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Competitive games can definitely be difficult to play sometimes when people get all upset about every move you make, but it's cool they were all chill! Glad you had a good time.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: It was great! Playing games is my escape from life struggles, so I generally don't get crazy competitive over them. The people at the convention were the same way!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Glad you found a way to have fun and escape! It's important to stay happy and de-stress. Keep doing what makes you happy!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: For sure! You should go to a writing convention or something sometime! The experience at this convention is unforgetable.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Do writing conventions exist? I'll have to look into that, it could be fun! Thanks for the idea. Have you been up to anything tonight?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Mostly just chilling at home. Playing video games or watching movies helps me unwind.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a bookcase filled with dvds and movies

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: That sounds great! What's your favorite game or movie that you've seen recently?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I recently saw a movie that blew my mind with all the twists and dream stuff, I think it was called "Inception". I've also been playing a game nonstop with a great futuristic setting and gameplay called "Cyberpunk 2077". Have you seen or played anything good lately?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I watched a classic movie the other day that was awesome - the story was so gripping and the actors were great! It really stuck with me.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a framed movie poster with a signed picture

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow, that must have been awesome! What would you rate it?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Well, it was amazing, so probably 9 or 10 out of 10! Movies can take us to different places and make us feel lots of emotions. What do you love about watching them?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Well they take me to new worlds and fill me with emotions. Plus, they're great for chilling out after a day.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I agree! They have the power to take us away and make us feel things not normally experienced in life. It's a great escape! Especially when you have a room like this!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a living room with a tv and candles

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow, it's so comfy in there! I should really get a set up like that.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: You should! It's one thing to watch a movie in a theater, but on a nice comfy couch with a good blanket, I feel so at peace!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Any pointers on what I should get for my living room to make it comfy like that?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Sure! For one, you should get a couch that can sit multiple people so that you can lay down if you want, and make sure its really fluffy! Also invest in a blanket that has a little bit of weight to it, and some lights that can be dimmed.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a poster of a man and a woman sitting on a bench

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Sounds like you really got into making your living room! Thanks, I'll try that out for myself!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: No problem! I get super invested in random little things like that, but I think its all worth it when I end up with random little things that make life so much nicer.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks for the tip! See you later!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: See ya Nate!

Session.Summary: Nate and Joanna caught up at 2:01 pm on 21 October, 2022. Joanna shared about perfecting a family recipe and the significance of a stuffed animal dog named Tilly. Nate mentioned his stress from tough competitors in a tournament but found joy in his turtles. They discussed how pets bring happiness and shared recent activities. Joanna mentioned a recent setback with a production company rejection, but Nate offered support and encouragement. They both expressed determination to keep pushing forward. Nate reassured Joanna of his support, and they ended the conversation with positive affirmations.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna perfects her dairy free dessert recipe of chocolate raspberry tart for her friends and family.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna receives a rejection from a production company for her third screenplay about loss, identity and connection.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna, what's been up? Haven't seen you since we last talked.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate! I have been revising and perfecting the recipe I made for my family and it turned out really tasty. What's been happening with you?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna! That's cool. I've been getting so stressed lately because of my tournament progress - tough competitors - but my turtles always cheer me up.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Pets have a way of brightening our days. I still have that stuffed animal dog you gave me! I named her Tilly, and she's always with me while I write.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a cat laying on the floor in a room

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Glad to hear it! What made you name her Tilly?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I used to have a dog back in Michigan with that name, but then I got allergic and we had to get rid of her. The name helps me remember her back when I used to be able to hold and squeeze animal without an allergic reaction!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: That's so touching! Glad the stuffed animal means so much!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Tilly helps me stay focused and brings me so much joy. It's amazing how even stuffed animals can do that!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: It really is, I'm not sure I'll ever understand why watching my turtles slowly walk around makes me so happy. But I'm very glad it does.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Same here! So have you been up to anything recenly?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yeah, I've just been practicing for my next video game tournemant. How about you?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Well, I had a bit of a setback recently - another rejection from a production company.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Bummer, Joanna. Is this the one you sent to a film contest? Rejections suck, but don't forget they don't define you. Keep at it and you'll find the perfect opportunity.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yeah.. Thanks, Nate. It's hard, but I won't let it slow me down. I'm gonna keep grinding and moving ahead.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: That's what I like to hear! I really respect you for that and being able to bounce back whenever something sad happens!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! Your encouragement really means a lot. I'm gonna keep pushing forward and believing in myself.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: You got this, and don't ever forget that you have people cheering you on from the sidelines wherever you go.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks! I'll see you around!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: No problem! Catch you later!

Session.Summary: At 8:16 pm on 25 October 2022, Nate asked Joanna how she's been. Joanna shared her excitement about having her script shown on the big screen for the first time, expressing a mix of emotions and satisfaction. Nate congratulated her and Joanna described the surreal experience of seeing her work come to life. The two discussed characters, with Joanna explaining her inspiration and Nate praising her drawings. They also talked about Nate's turtles and their varied diet. Joanna found it fascinating and admired how Nate's turtles have different personalities. The conversation ended with Nate expressing his love for turtles and Joanna looking forward to hearing more about them in the future.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: A movie based on a second script that Joanna contributed to is released on the big screen

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate takes his two turtles out for a walk.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna, what's been up since we last chatted? How's it going?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate! Another movie script that I contributed to was shown on the big screen last Sunday for the first time! It was such a surreal experience to see everything come together. I felt a mix of emotions, but overall, it was a satisfying moment. I've been waiting for this for a long time!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a box of cards with a quote on it

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text:
Congrats Joanna! How was it to finally see it on the big screen?
[shares a photo holding a videogame controller]
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a box with a controller inside of it

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: It was an amazing experience! I'll never forget seeing all of the characters and dialogue I wrote being acted out - it was such a cool feeling. Having all the hard work and determination I put into writing pay off was definitely rewarding. I know this is the third time it's happened, but its just so awesome!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: That must have been amazing. What was your favorite part of it?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Seeing my characters I worked so hard on come alive was my favorite part. It felt like they jumped off the page and became real - it was totally surreal.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a drawing book with a bunch of drawings on it

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow Joanna, those drawings are really incredible! What inspired you to create them?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! They're visuals of the characters to help bring them alive in my head so I can write better.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: That's a cool way to gain insight into your characters. Where did you get your ideas for them?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I got ideas from everywhere: people I know, stuff I saw, even what I imagined. It's cool to see how an idea takes shape into a person with their own wants, worries, and wishes.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow Joanna, that's so cool! It's amazing how our imaginations can bring ideas to life. Can you tell me more about the character on the left in the photo?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Nope! You'll just have to watch the movie and find out for yourself!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: You got it. I was already planning on watching it, but talking to you about it makes me want to watch it even more!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Awesome! Well enough about me, what have you been up to?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I was bored today, so I just took my turtles out for a walk.
Turn.image_caption: a photography of two turtles sitting on a log in a pond

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Sound fun! Did they have a good time?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Of course! They look tired from all the walking, so they're relaxing in the tank right now.
Turn.image_caption: a photography of a dog laying on a rock in a zoo

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Aww, they're so cute! What do they eat?
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a spoon full of ice cream and chocolate sauce

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: They eat a combination of vegetables, fruits, and insects. They have a varied diet.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a container of lettuce and other greens

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow, that's fascinating! It's interesting how they have such a varied diet, including insects. Do you have a favorite among their food choices?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I love seeing them eat fruit - they get so hyped and it's so cute!
Turn.image_caption: a photography of a group of strawberries and a turtle on a table

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow, that's so cute! They look like they really enjoy fruit.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yeah, it's adorable! Watching them enjoy their favorite snacks is so fun. I also like holding them.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a person holding a small turtle in their hand

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Do they have different personalities, like the way dogs and cats do?
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a rock formation with a person standing on the side

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yeah, they each do. One is more adventurous while the other is more reserved, which I find cute. Having them around brings me joy and they make great companions.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: That's super cool! I never knew turtles could be so interesting until I met your turtles. Wow!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I've always liked turtles since I was a boy, so I know all about them!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: You'll have to keep me posted on them! It's been fun chatting!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: See you later Joanna!

Session.Summary: At 3:56 pm on November 4, 2022, Joanna excitedly told Nate about setting up meetings with movie producers, leading to Nate's congratulatory response about her hard work. Joanna described the positive producer meetings, feeling validated and hopeful. Nate compared her success to winning a video game tournament. They discussed Joanna's earlier writings and passion for writing, including a childhood story about a brave turtle. Nate expressed admiration for her perseverance and encouraged her to keep pushing herself. They exchanged updates on their current projects. Nate invited Joanna over to try a lactose-free dish he made, and they planned to share desserts the next day. Joanna agreed to bring her chocolate and raspberry cake. They bid farewell, looking forward to their meeting.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna schedules several meetings with movie producers to discuss her second screenplay which is about a thirty year old woman on a journey of self-discovery after suffering loss.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate helps the people he met at the international video game tournament in August to reset their high scores.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow, Nate, I'm on fire! I just set up meetings with movie producers — my dreams are comin' true!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow Joanna, nice work! How did it go with those producer meetings?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! The meetings went really well. I felt confident discussing my script and vision and they seemed interested and excited. They loved the elements of self-discovery in it. It was so validating to be taken seriously. I'm feeling hopeful and inspired about the future!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Way to go, Joanna! Putting yourself out there is really brave and winning recognition for your hard work feels great. It's just like when I win a video game tournament - it feels awesome! I'm so proud of you and so glad you're feeling hopeful and inspired.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a television screen showing a game being played

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks Nate! Your support and encouragement mean a lot. Writing isn't always easy but moments like these make me appreciate it. I'm so thankful for all the opportunities. Last week, I found these old notebooks with my early writings - it was cool to see how far I've come.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a notebook with a list of things to write

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: That's cool! You must love seeing how you've grown as an artist. Is there a favorite piece from your early writings that stands out to you?
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a turtle laying on a bed of rocks and gravel

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yup, I still remember this story from when I was 10. It was about a brave little turtle who was scared but explored the world anyway. Maybe even back then, I was inspired by stories about finding courage and taking risks. It's still a part of my writing today.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: You obviously have a passion for writing, and it's funny the story was about a turtle! Their resilience is so inspiring! Take courage and keep pushing yourself with your writing. Great job!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a turtle laying on a bed of rocks and gravel

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! They make me think of strength and perseverance. They help motivate me in tough times - glad you find that inspiring!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: What can I say, I love turtles. So, what's been happening with you?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate! Apart from meetings, I'm working on a project - challenging but fulfilling. How about you? What's been going on?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Just been helping some friends reset their high scores at the international tournament. It's been fun!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow, sounds like so much fun! You're really passionate about gaming. Have an awesome time and keep helping others with those high scores!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks! It feels good to use my skills to make a difference.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I couldn't agree more! Which is why my meetings are so exciting!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: On another note, want to come over and try some of this? It's super yummy, just made it yesterday!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a bowl of ice cream with a spoon in it

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Mmm, that looks delicious! Is it lactose-free by any chance?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yep, I made it with coconut milk so it's lactose-free!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks so much, Nate! Sure! I'll come over tomorrow if that's fine.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a bowl of ice cream with a spoon in it

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I don't see why not! I'm not doing anything then, so your completely welcome to!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Awesome! I'll bring some of my recipes so we can both share deserts!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I'd love that! I've been wanting to try some of your chocolate and rasberry cake for a while now.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: You got it! See you tomorrow!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: See you then! Take care!

Session.Summary: Nate and Joanna talked at 8:10 pm on 7 November, 2022. Nate won a Valorant tournament last Saturday, while Joanna finished a presentation for producers on Friday. Nate is preparing for more tournaments and enjoys being busy. Joanna is working on a new movie script and has submitted scripts recently. They both value creating and cherishing memories. Nate has turtles and upgraded his gaming setup. Joanna enjoys writing and recalls childhood memories fondly. They encourage each other to pursue their dreams and make more memories together.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna prepares a presentation for her movie script on a woman on a journey of self-discovery for the meetings with movie producers.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna starts writing another movie script based on a love story and puts her brother's childhood letter to her in the Introduction part.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate wins a Valorant video game tournament

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate upgrades his gaming equipment at home

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna! Hope you’re doing alright. Crazy thing happened - I was in the final of a big Valorant tournament last Saturday, and I won! It was the best feeling to see my name as the champion. Tournaments really bring out strong emotions in me.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate! Congrats on winning the tournament - that's awesome! I know you must have been buzzing! Anyway, I've been working on something exciting too. Last Friday, I finished the presentation for producers - it was tough but it's looking good. What have you been up to?
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a notebook with a handwritten letter on it

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks, Joanna! I've been having a blast and preparing for other tournaments, so I've been real busy - but I'm loving it!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Sounds like you're really loving life right now! It's great when you find something that suits you. Being busy can be tiring but it's so rewarding in the end. Keep it up!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a book with a black border and a white title

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks, Joanna! I'm really grateful to have a job I enjoy every day. So anyways, anything new going on in your life?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: I am writing another movie script! It's a love story with lots of challenges. I've put lots of hard work into it and I'm hoping to get it on the big screen.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Woah Joanna, that's incredible! I remember when you started working on these sorta things. It's crazy to see how far you've gotten! You've really got a thing for writing, huh? Where'd you get the idea for it?
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a turtle laying on a bed of rocks and gravel

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks Nate! Writing has always been a passion of mine. I got the idea for this script from a dream. How have your turtles been? I haven't seen pictures of them in a while!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Great actually! These little guys sure bring joy to my life! Watching them is so calming and fascinating. I've really grown fond of them. So, what about you, Joanna? What brings you happiness?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Creating stories and watching them come alive gives me happiness and fulfillment. Writing has been such a blessing for me.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Well with dedication like yours, its no wonder you do so well in it as well! Are you planning on submitting anymore scripts anytime soon?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yep! I actually just submitted a few more last week! Hoping to hear back from them soon, though I assume a few will be rejected.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Even if it happens to a few, I'm sure at leasts one will make it to the screens and be your 3rd published movie!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! Appreciate the encouragement. I won't give up, I promise! Got it covered!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Great to hear! On another note, I just upgraded some of my equipment at home. Check it out!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a desk with a computer monitor and a keyboard

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Oh wow, ice set-up! Do you use that computer for gaming?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yep! This is where I practice and compete. Sometimes I even use it when I'm playing games with friends.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Cool! Having a dedicated space for practice and competition should help you stay focused.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yeah, I love it. It's like my own little haven to escape into the virtual world.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a desk with two monitors and a laptop

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow, that sounds great to have your own gaming setup at home. It must be really awesome!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: It really is! But it's also really important to have something like this for my career, otherwise I would never be able to beat my competition.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a pair of headphones and a video game controller

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: That makes sense! It's all about practice isn't it? So what's your favorite game?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yep! I'm currently playing this awesome fantasy RPG called "Xeonoblade Chronicles" and it's been a blast! I highly reccomend it if you've never played it before.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of two nintendo game covers with a picture of a group of people

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: What made you start playing it? That's a japanese game series right?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yes it is! I'm a big fan of Nintendo games, and I've actually been wanting to play this one for a while because my friends have played it and reccomended it!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a woman in a costume holding a glass

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Nice! It's really cool when a reccomendation from a friend fits your taste so well isn't it?
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a captain america costume on display in a museum

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: For sure! That's why I love when you give me movie reccomendations, I usually like them a lot more then if I were to just watch some random one.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Great to hear! I just finished with the intro to my next movie script, and I decided to include this at the begining.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a handwritten letter from a young man

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: That letter is really awesome! Does it remind you of your childhood?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yeah, it does! My brother wrote it - he used to make me these cute notes when we were kids. Brings back sweet memories.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Aww, childhood memories can be so powerful!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: They sure can! They take us back to simpler times but it's nice to create new memories as we grow up.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of two little girls in pink dresses standing in front of a castle

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Totally! I had a special day when I took my pets to the park. They were amazed and seeing their happy faces made it a memorable day. Mixing the new with the old is priceless - I treasure every memory!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: That sounds so sweet, Nate! I started writing some of my favorite memories down.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a person holding a notebook with a list of things on it

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Dang, your full of great ideas Joanna! I really should start doing that as well, or at least write down the things my animals like a lot!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: You should! I completely encourage it, looking back on fond memories is such a blessing.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Ok I will! But I'll also start writing down some of my favorite memories with you from now on.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Definitely, let's keep making great memories and supporting each other. Let's keep reaching for our dreams and make them happen!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of two women sitting on a bed laughing and laughing

Session.Summary: At 5:54 pm on 9 November 2022, Nate and Joanna had a conversation about their recent activities and future plans. Nate mentioned trying out cooking due to a game tournament delay and showed Joanna his homemade coconut ice cream. He didn't make it to the finals in the last tournament but was positive about the next one and considering joining a new gaming team. Joanna shared that she pitched a script to producers and got positive feedback, boosting her confidence. Nate talked about creating gaming content for YouTube, while Joanna worked on a new suspenseful thriller script. They discussed supporting each other's goals and shared hobbies, including nature photography and turtle-keeping. Joanna planned to visit Nate to watch him play with the turtles from a distance due to her allergy. They made plans to hang out and parted ways, with Nate promising to bathe the turtles before her visit. Joanna said, "See you tomorrow," and Nate replied, "Bye Joanna."

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna pitches her new movie script based on a love story and it resonates with movie producers.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna starts working on a new script on a thriller story set in a small Midwestern town

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate thinks about joining a new gaming team after receving a couple of offers

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate's video game tournament gets pushed back

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate starts creating gaming content for YouTube to entertain folks and satisfy his video game craving

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate gets a third pet turtle

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna, what a wild week! My game tournament got pushed back, so I tried out some cooking. Look at this homemade coconut ice cream! The sprinkles kinda changed the color this time around.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a person scooping a scoop of ice cream into a pan

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate, that looks yummy! Wish I could try it, but I can't right now. How did the last game tournament go?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna, thanks! Tough tournament, didn't make it to the finals. But that's okay, I'll get 'em next time!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Aww, bummer! But the important thing is to stay positive. So, what's your next move in the gaming world?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks Joanna! Staying positive is key. I'm thinking of joining a new gaming team after this next tourney - I've had a few offers, but I haven't decided yet. It's gonna be a big step, but I'm ready for a shake up.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Sounds great, Nate! Making a switch could open up new opportunities. Wishing you luck with picking the right team!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks, Joanna! I really appreciate it. It's a big decision, but I'm excited for what the future holds. How about you? Anything exciting happening on your end?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yup! I worked hard on another script and eventually created a plan for getting it made into a movie. It was a ton of work but satisfying. I pitched it to some producers yesterday and they really liked it. It gave me a big confidence boost!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Congrats on the chance to pitch your script - super impressive. Proud of you!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a trophy and a game controller on a table

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Appreciate you, Nate! Your support and encouragement mean a lot to me. I feel like I just can't stop writing write now!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a pen and notebook on a table with a book

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Anytime. What're you working on in that notebook? Anything cool?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate, I'm working on a new project - a suspenseful thriller set in a small Midwestern town. It's been a great creative outlet for me. How about you? Do you have any projects you're working on?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yeah actually - creating gaming content for YouTube. It's a cool way to entertain folks and satisfy my video game cravings at the same time when there aren't any tourneys going on.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a desk with a computer, headphones, and a microphone

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow, that's a cool idea! What inspired you to start making gaming videos?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Hey Joanna, I'm a big fan of them and thought it would be a fun idea to start making them myself. I'm hoping to share my love of gaming and connect with others who enjoy it too.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Way to go, Nate! Making videos and connecting with people about gaming - that's awesome! You'll do great!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Thanks Joanna! Appreciate the support. It's new to me but I'm excited to get started!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Make sure you watch other peoples videos first so you get a handle on what your audience likes! That way your videos don't flop when you post them.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a computer screen displaying a product listing

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Already doing that, but thanks for the advice!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a computer screen with a message on it

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: No worries, Nate! It's great to support each other in reaching our goals. On another note, check out this pic I got a while back!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a sunflower in a field with a sunset in the background

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow, that sunset pic looks incredible! What inspired you to take that photo?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Thanks, Nate! I took that pic on a hike last summer near Fort Wayne. The sunset and the surrounding beauty were just incredible. It was an awesome reminder of nature's beauty.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: That sounds incredible! Nature truly has a way of reminding us to appreciate the beauty around us, and moments like those really stay with you. These critters also make me appreciate life's little joys. And guess what? I got them a new friend!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of three turtles sitting on a rock in a pond

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow, what made you get a third?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Turtles really bring me joy and peace. They have such an effect on us - best buddies ever! I saw another at a pet store and just hade to get him. The tank is big enough now for three, so I figured why not!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a turtle swimming in a tank with a metal bar

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Wow! It's always a shock where life will take us next! I bet just last week you would have never thought you would be getting a third turtle this year!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: You got that right, but I'm very happy with the descision and wouldn't have it any other way.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Can I come over sometime and watch you play with them? From a distance I mean, since I'm allergic.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Definitely! I'd love to have you over again. Maybe we can watch one of your movies together or go to the park!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: For sure! I'd love to do either of those things with you!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Sounds good. Well I'll make sure I give the turtles a bath before you get here so they're ready to play.

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Alright, see you tomorrow!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Bye Joanna!

Session.Summary: Joanna excitedly shared with Nate at 12:06 am on 11 November, 2022, that she was filming her own movie from a road-trip script. Nate congratulated her, mentioning it's not surprising due to her hard work. Joanna was thrilled to see her script come to life on set daily. She shared that an actor complimenting her script was a highlight. Nate then recounted a peaceful trip with his turtles to the beach in Tampa. Joanna praised the turtles, saying they looked serene. Nate likened turtles to zen masters for their calming effect. Nate then showed Joanna his colorful coconut milk ice cream bowls and offered her a taste. Joanna expressed interest in trying it, and the conversation ended on a positive note as they caught up and bid each other farewell.

Event.speaker: Joanna
Event.description: Joanna starts filming her movie based on her script of a woman's journey of self-discovery over a raod trip.

Event.speaker: Nate
Event.description: Nate takes his turtles to the beach in Tampa

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Nate, can you believe it? I'm finally filming my own movie from the road-trip script!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a person holding a clap board with a dog sleeping in a dog bed

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Congrats, Joanna! Not surprised at all that your hard work paid off. Must feel awesome to see your script come alive in a movie! Pretty cool when something you love brings success, right? Tell me more about your movie!
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a trophy and a game controller on a table

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Woohoo, thanks Nate! It's pretty wild to see it come alive. Every day on set is awesome and full of potential. Being able to show my vision is awesome.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: I think so too! What's been the coolest moment on set?
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a fish tank with a fish inside of it

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: One of the actors came up to me and told me how much she liked my script! I was so excited when that happened - it gave me chills!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Wow Joanna, that must have been so exciting! It's incredible when you get those moments of joy. Anyway, I took my turtles to the beach in Tampa yesterday! They always bring me peace in the craziness of life.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a turtle in a sink with a reflection of its head

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Woah, that's awesome, Nate! You must really enjoy having them around - they're so cool! What do you love most about having them?

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Your completely right! I really love having them around. They're so cool and they make me feel calm. Plus, they don't require much looking after, which is great. I love seeing them soaking in the sun like this.
Turn.image_caption: a photo of a turtle sitting on a log in a pond

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: That's awesome, Nate! They look so serene and happy. It's great to have something like that.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Yeah, turtles are like zen masters! They always remind me to slow down and appreciate the small things in life. I'm loving experimenting with flavors right now. Here are some colorful bowls of coconut milk ice cream that I made.
Turn.image_caption: a photography of a bowl of ice cream with a spoon in it

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Hey Nate, that looks really yummy! The colors and mix-ins give it a nice kick.

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: Nice! I'm glad you like it too. This recipe really jazzes it up. Wanna give it a try?

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Definitely, Nate! That ice cream looks mouthwatering. Thanks so much for offering!

Turn.speaker: Nate
Turn.text: No worries, Joanna. Hope you enjoy it!

Turn.speaker: Joanna
Turn.text: Yea, no worries! It was great catching up. Take it easy!
